pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly downloads and saves the target file to this path.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which downloads from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/opengeos/data/main/raster/landsat.tif.
Confirmed via task.json description which explicitly instructs the agent to save the clustered DIMAP product to this exact path.
Confirmed via task.json description which explicitly instructs the agent to export a GeoTIFF to this exact path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Landsat multispectral satellite imagery downloaded from github.com/opengeos/data. The target data file is populated at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif by setup_task.sh. The agent must export the final clustered data to /home/ga/snap_exports/water_clusters.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/water_clusters.tif. To pass verification, the target DIMAP file's XML metadata must contain evidence of conditional NaN logic for masking and an unsupervised K-Means execution restricted to the new virtual bands.
